Emulin distribution NOTICE
==========================

This distribution bundles third-party software. Below are the components,
their origin, and their licenses.


1. Emulin (this software)
-------------------------
Copyright (C) 1998-2026  Kiyoka Nishiyama
License: GNU General Public License version 2 (see COPYING)
Source : https://github.com/kiyoka/emulin


2. Eclipse Temurin OpenJDK (bundled JRE under jre/)
---------------------------------------------------
Provider : Eclipse Foundation (Adoptium project)
Version  : OpenJDK 21 (see jre/release for the exact build)
License  : GNU General Public License version 2 ONLY,
           with the "Classpath Exception"
           and the "OpenJDK Assembly Exception"
Full text: jre/legal/java.base/LICENSE
           jre/legal/java.base/ASSEMBLY_EXCEPTION
           jre/legal/java.base/ADDITIONAL_LICENSE_INFO
Source   : https://github.com/adoptium/temurin21-binaries
           https://github.com/openjdk/jdk21u

Per the Classpath Exception, linking this JRE from independent modules
does not by itself cause those modules to fall under the GPL. The bundled
JRE is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. To obtain the
corresponding source code of the bundled JRE, follow the URLs above.

Third-party licenses included in jre/legal/<module>/ cover:
  AES test vectors, ASM, c-libutl, CLDR, ICU, Public Suffix List,
  SipHash, Unicode data, etc. (see each .md file)


3. BusyBox (bundled under rootfs/bin/busybox)
---------------------------------------------
Provider : The BusyBox project (https://busybox.net/)
License  : GNU General Public License version 2
Source   : https://busybox.net/downloads/

The bundled busybox is a Linux x86-64 ELF binary that runs INSIDE the
Emulin emulator (it does not run as a native host process).


4. JLine 3 (linked into emulin-*-all.jar)
-----------------------------------------
Provider : The JLine project (https://github.com/jline/jline3)
License  : BSD-3-Clause


5. Real Linux binaries (demo bundle only — rootfs/usr/bin/, rootfs/usr/lib/)
---------------------------------------------------------------------------
The "emulin-demo-*" zip bundles a Debian/Ubuntu-derived rootfs containing
git, curl, openssl, python3, wget and supporting libraries. Each binary
retains its upstream license (typically GPLv2/v3, LGPL, MIT, BSD, Apache,
or OpenSSL). License files for installed packages are under
rootfs/usr/share/doc/<package>/copyright. These binaries are Linux ELF
files executed by the Emulin emulator, not by the host OS.


GPLv2 source-availability notice
================================
Emulin is distributed under GPL v2. The corresponding source for this
release is available at:

  https://github.com/kiyoka/emulin

Eclipse Temurin and BusyBox sources are available at the URLs noted above.
